title: Verdant Wonders
description: Verdant Wonders adds a lot of blocks to your world, such as plants, flowers, etc.
body:
Verdant Wonders adds a lot of blocks to your world, such as plants, flowers, etc.

GRASSES:Flowery Grass, Sedge Grass, Snowy Grass, Thatching Grass, Wildgrass, Willow Grass, Desert Grass (7)

FOLIAGE:Big Herb, Big Shrub, Bugleweed, Buttonbush, Herb, Lily Pads, Lungwort, Mayapple, Reeds, Shelf Fungi, Shrub, Small Herb, Small Shrub, Snowy Shrub, Sprout, Sweet Woodruff, Algae, Slim Cactus, Barrel Cactus, Tumbleweed, Tumbleweed Seeds (21)

FLOWERS:Bleeding Heart, Bloodroot, Blue Anemone, Blue Freesia, Blue Hyacinth, Blue Hydrangea, Bluebells, Blue Columbine, Red Columbine, Lavender, Marigold, Pink Anemone, Pink Freesia, Pink Hyacinth, Pink Hydrangea, Pink Orchid, Purple Primrose, Red Anemone, Snowdrops, Swamp Sunflower, Trillium, White Daffodil, White Hyacinth, White Hydrangea, White Orchid, Yellow Daffodil, Yellow Freesia, Yellow Hyacinth, Yellow Primrose,(29)
OTHER:Log, Ousted Oak Log, Stripped Ousted Oak Log, Mossy Ousted Oak Log, Ousted Birch Log, Stripped Ousted Birch Log, Mossy Ousted Birch Log, Rocks, Joshua Tree (Top), Joshua Tree (Bottom), Joshua Sapling, Rooted Sand (13)
BLOCKS (PLANTS,FLOWERS,FOLIAGE,OTHER) ADDED BY MOD:Sprout, Small Shrub, Shrub, Big Shrub, Wildgrass, White Hydrangea, Blue Hydrangea, Pink Hydrangea, Blue Anemone, Pink Anemone, Red Anemone, Yellow Daffodil, White Daffodil, Blue Hyacinth, White Hyacinth, Yellow Hyacinth, Pink Hyacinth, Marigold, White Orchid, Pink Orchid, Pink Freesia, Blue Freesia, Yellow Freesia, Flowery Grass, Snowy Grass, Snowy Shrub, Small Herb, Herb, Big Herb, Trillium, Bloodroot, Blue Columbine, Red Columbine, Mayapple, Lungwort, Bleeding Heart, Snowdrops, Yellow Primrose, Purple Primrose, Sweet Woodruff, Bluebell, Bugleweed, Lavender, Buttonbush, Swamp Sunflower, Sedge Grass, Algae, Lily Pads, Reeds, Willow Grass, Thatching Grass, Log, Shelf Fungi, Slim Cactus, Barrel Cactus, Desert Grass, Tumbleweed, Tumbleweed Seeds, Ousted Oak Log, Stripped Ousted Oak Log, Mossy Ousted Oak Log, Ousted Birch Log, Stripped Ousted Birch Log, Mossy Ousted Birch Log, Rocks, Joshua Tree (Top), Joshua Tree (Bottom), Joshua Sapling, Rooted Sand,  (68)
